## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss ProjectMark's content strategy, SEO performance, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [R2B2 tool installed; tracking 6 profiles (5 existing clients, 1 non-ICP)](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Blog CTR (3.3%) outperforming overall site (2.1%), but room for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [New content topics proposed; focus on pre-construction and lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [E-book creation planned as a new lead magnet initiative](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)

## Topics

### R2B2 Implementation

  - [Installed yesterday, now tracking 6 profiles](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [5 existing clients, 1 non-ICP profile](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Gus aims to refine ICP configuration for better tracking](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [Andrej to loop in Jimmy for additional R2B2 expertise if needed](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)

### Content Strategy & SEO Performance

  - [33 new topics proposed, focusing on pre-construction and lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Some topics have high search volume and low keyword difficulty (e.g., "lead generation for architecture" KD 29)](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Blog section CTR: 3.3% (last 12 months)](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [Overall website CTR: 2.1% (last 12 months)](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [Industry average CTR: 6-7% for organic search results](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [Increasing impressions and clicks observed in Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Meta optimization for 24-25 articles completed](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)

### Technical Issues

  - [Persistent issue with internal links appearing in AirApp despite not being published](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Andrej added prompt in feedback loop to use only published internal links](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
  - [Webflow backend occasionally logs out users when making changes](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)

### E-book Initiative

  - [Agreed to create e-books as lead magnets, focusing on pre-construction topics](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
  - [Andrej to brainstorm ideas and send proposals by Monday/Tuesday](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Collaboration planned with Juliano (ProjectMark's designer) for e-book design](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### Communication Challenges

  - [Andrej experiencing Slack issues, unable to access on mobile or desktop](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Gus noting sporadic message delivery on Slack](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Gus to review and approve new content topics in AirTable](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Andrej to research and report on additional CTR improvement tactics](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Andrej to send e-book topic ideas by Monday/Tuesday](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Gus to review and publish prepared Webflow articles by Friday](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=1167.0)
  - [Andrej to perform final link checks on prepared articles](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [Andrej to send meeting recap and set e-book project deadlines once Slack is operational](https://fathom.video/share/LxPKJwgB9Bx_YKh31kW5GjFDR_o6asa5?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
